name: PreviewView
visual_summary: PreviewView is a toggleable component that displays a button with an eye and code icon. It allows developers to toggle between a preview and code view of content. It's useful when you need a simple, reusable toggle button.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: PreviewView
Description: PreviewView is a toggleable component that displays a button with an eye and code icon. It allows developers to toggle between a preview and code view of content. It's useful when you need a simple, reusable toggle button.
Style: minimal
Interactions: clickable
Tags: toggle, button, preview

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/PreviewView.astro
---
import { Eye, Code } from '@lucide/astro'

interface Props {
  src: string
}

const { src } = Astro.props
---

<preview-view data-src={src}>
  <button
    type="button"
    aria-label="Toggle preview mode"
    aria-pressed="true"
    class="inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-md border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 transition-colors hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50"
